name: Alamak Senin Sekolah
lore:
Lore of Alamak Senin Sekolah
                                    


Alamak Senin Sekolah is an Indonesian Brainrot character created by TikTok user @noxaasht on the 11th of July, 2025.[1]
It is a wooden "14" numbered sign with human limbs in place of eyes and a jaw with rotten teeth. It can be seen in school only appeared at the "Back to School" event programme. It is said to punish students who is too late to school or violating rules.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Alamak! Senin! Sekolah! Hoo-hoo-hoo. Sepatuh belum dicuci. Seragam masih ilang entah di mana. Hati-hati! Anomali ini muncul setiap senin pagi. Datang nyari anak-anak yang belum siap sekolah. Kalau kamu masih leha-leha, masih nge-scroll TikTok, terus sepatuh kamu hitam kayak arang. Wah! Dia makin semangat. Dan yang lebih parah. Anomali ini sering kerja sama-sama mama kamu. Mama kamu marah ditambah anomali datang? Tamat riwayat kalian. Ingat! Senin Upacara! "GET OU-"
Translated (English)
Oh my! Monday! School! Hoo-hoo-hoo. Shoes haven't been washed. Uniforms are still missing who knows where. Watch out! This anomaly appears every Monday morning. It comes looking for children who aren't ready for school. If you're still lazing around, scrolling through TikTok, and your shoes are as black as charcoal. Wow! He's even more enthusiastic. And what's worse. This anomaly often works together with your mother. Your mother is angry plus the anomaly comes? It's the end of your life. Remember! Monday Ceremony! "GET OU-"
